question: Which year from 2005-2010 has the highest drug overdose death rate for all persons? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A public health analyst wants to pinpoint the peak year of overdose death rates in the late 2000s.

1.fact: Filtering to STUB_NAME = "Total" and STUB_LABEL = "All persons", the highest average drug overdose death rate in 2005-2010 occurs in 2010 at 4.358333333333333.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2005-2010 has the highest drug overdose death rate for all persons? (Filter STUB_NAME == "Total" and STUB_LABEL == "All persons"; average ESTIMATE by YEAR; select the maximum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Filter to total population, average ESTIMATE by YEAR (2005-2010), and select the maximum; the peak year is 2010.
